Jo White MP

BASSETLAW'S STRONG VOICE

KEEP UP TO DATE

Subscribe to receive my regular email newsletter and online surveys. Your views are important to me.

By completing the form, you agree to receive regular updates from Jo White MP. The information you provide will be processed in accordance with my Privacy Policy.

It is an honour and a privilege to have been elected to serve the people of Bassetlaw as your Member of Parliament.

I want to be an MP who listens and understands the issues that matter to you. Please do sign up to receive my regular email newsletter and surveys. If you need my assistance, you can contact me using the form below.

GET IN TOUCH

As your local MP, I am here to help. You can contact me using the form below or you can email me: [email protected]

  • 01909 212171
  • [email protected]

4 days ago

❓As part of my 'Ask me Anything' series, Craig asked me "With your colleague Ed Miliband's big push for a net-zero UK, why are electricity prices still connected to gas prices?"

⚡While this is currently true, the Government has a plan to de-couple the link between the price of gas and electric, bringing down energy bills for households and businesses right across Bassetlaw. ... See MoreSee Less
